rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope before using them in AGREE contracts.
When AGREE reports type errors, trace the first unresolved identifier on the same line and resolve it or remove the invalid clause.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, only reference identifiers that are explicitly declared or visible in the current component scope.
When a guarantee or assumption references an identifier that cannot be resolved, remove the clause or fix the reference to a valid identifier.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have consistent types; avoid mixing <error> types with valid types.
Ensure that all identifiers used in AGREE contracts are either declared in the same annex or are valid AADL features.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE reference errors; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts unless properly represented through variables or outputs.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics related to component type contracts
